mapper.select: SELECT user_id, tenant_id, tenant_display_name, roles_json::text AS roles_json, location_scopes_json::text AS location_scopes_json, partner_scopes_json::text AS partner_scopes_json FROM tenant_memberships WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY tenant_id

SELECT user_id, tenant_id, tenant_display_name, roles_json::text AS roles_json, location_scopes_json::text AS location_scopes_json, partner_scopes_json::text AS partner_scopes_json FROM tenant_memberships WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
